searchIndex.title: Installation Requirements
searchIndex.description: Requires .NET Framework version 4.7.2 (included in Windows 10 & 11; Windows 7/8 users must install it separately).

searchIndex.title: Post-Installation Setup
searchIndex.description: Launch Crew Chief, click 'Download sound pack', click 'Download driver names', select your game from the top-right list, click 'Start Application', then launch your game.

searchIndex.title: Configuration Properties
searchIndex.description: Customise Crew Chief's behaviour via the 'Properties' button. Defaults are sensible. Search for game-specific preferences by typing: ACS, AMS, R3E, rF1, rF2 or pCars.

searchIndex.title: Swearing and Complaints
searchIndex.description: Swearing is disabled by default (enable via Properties UI). 'Max complaints per session' defaults to 60 to prevent excessive grumbling; set to 0 to eliminate complaints entirely.

searchIndex.title: Troubleshooting Startup Issues
searchIndex.description: If Crew Chief fails to start, delete configuration files at C:\Users\[username]\AppData\Local\Britton_IT_Ltd\ and delete all subfolders. (AppData is hidden; enable hidden folders in File Explorer).

searchIndex.title: Log Files and Crash Reports
searchIndex.description: Crew Chief logs information in the Console window. Logs are saved to <Documents>\CrewChiefV4\debugLogs with timestamps. Upload logs to the forum, Discord, or via confidential email for help.

searchIndex.title: Windows Speech Recognizer
searchIndex.description: Built-in Windows system. Requires better quality voice input but can be trained to recognise individual voices. Enable by checking 'Prefer Windows speech recogniser' in Properties. For non-English Windows, add the English (US) language pack.

searchIndex.title: Microsoft Speech Platform
searchIndex.description: Optimised for noisy environments and poor quality sound. No training required. Requires installing the Speech Platform Runtime (SpeechPlatformRuntime.msi) and the English language pack (MSSpeech_SR_en-US_TELE.msi or en-GB).

searchIndex.title: Voice Recognition Device and Modes
searchIndex.description: Uses the Windows 'Default' recording device (select in Windows Sounds). Two modes: 'Always On' (listens continuously) or 'Hold Button' (push-to-talk). nAudio is not recommended as it lacks trigger-word support.

searchIndex.title: Free Dictation Chat (Experimental)
searchIndex.description: Available for iRacing, pCars2, and R3E. Types chat messages via speech. Trigger word is 'chat' (e.g., 'chat, good luck everyone'). Requires good accuracy; complete speech recognition training for best results.

searchIndex.title: Rally Voice Commands
searchIndex.description: Uses a significantly lower confidence threshold due to the many permutations of words in pace notes. 'Hold button' mode is recommended to prevent accidental stage-note entries from background noise.

searchIndex.title: Car Status Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: how's my fuel, how's my tyre wear, how's my body work, how's my aero, how's my engine, how's my transmission, how's my suspension, how's my pace, how's my delta best.

searchIndex.title: Temperatures (Good/Bad) Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: how are my tyre temps, how are my tyre temperatures, how are my brakes, how are my brake temps, how are my brake temperatures, how are my engine temps, how are my engine temperatures.

searchIndex.title: Temperatures (Actual Values) Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what are my brake temps, what are my tyre temps, what's my oil temp, what's my water temp.

searchIndex.title: Race Information Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what's my gap in front, what's my gap ahead, what's my gap behind, what's my last lap, what's my last lap time, what's my lap time, what's my position, what's my fuel level, what's my best lap, what's my best lap time, what's the fastest lap.

searchIndex.title: Message Toggle Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: keep quiet, i know what i'm doing, leave me alone (switches off messages). keep me informed, keep me posted, keep me updated (switches messages back on).

searchIndex.title: Session Time / Laps Remaining
searchIndex.description: Phrases: how long's left, how many laps are left, how many laps to go.

searchIndex.title: Spotter Toggle Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: spot (turns spotter on), don't spot (turns spotter off). Note: the spotter still operates in 'leave me alone' mode unless explicitly switched off.

searchIndex.title: Penalty Status Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: do i still have a penalty, do i have a penalty, have i served my penalty.

searchIndex.title: Mandatory Pit Stop Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: do i have to pit, do i need to pit, do i have a mandatory pit stop, do i have a mandatory stop, do i have to make a pit stop.

searchIndex.title: Opponent Info (by Driver Name) Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: where's [driver], what's [driver]'s last lap, what's [driver]'s best lap, what's [driver]'s irating, what's [driver]'s license class, what tyre is [driver] on.

searchIndex.title: Opponent Info (by Race Position) Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what's [position]'s last lap, what's [position]'s best lap, what's [position]'s irating, what's [position]'s license class, what tyre is [position] on (e.g., 'what's p 4's last lap').

searchIndex.title: Car Ahead / Behind Info Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what's the car in front's last lap, what's the car ahead's best lap, what's the car behind's irating, what's the guy behind's license class, etc.

searchIndex.title: Sector Time Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what are my sector times, what's my last sector time.

searchIndex.title: Leader and On-Track Position Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: who's leading, who's ahead, who's ahead in the race, who's in front, who's behind, who's ahead on track, who's in front on track, who's behind on track.

searchIndex.title: Gaps / Deltas Mode Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: tell me the gaps, give me the deltas (switches on auto-readouts). don't tell me the gaps, no more deltas (switches off).

searchIndex.title: Miscellaneous Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: repeat last message, say again, what time is it, what's my fuel usage, what tyres am i on, calculate fuel for [X] minutes/laps, how much fuel for [X] laps.

searchIndex.title: RaceRoom Tyre Pace Comparison
searchIndex.description: Phrases: give me tyre pace differences, what are the tyre speeds, whats the difference between tyres, compare tyre compounds. (RaceRoom only)

searchIndex.title: Rolling / Formation Lap Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: this is the formation lap, formation lap, rolling start (enables manual rolling-start mode). standing start, no formation lap (disables it).

searchIndex.title: Attack / Defend Strategy Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: where should i attack, where am i faster, where can i attack (finds where you gain time on the car ahead). where should i defend, where am i slower, where is he faster, where will he attack (finds where you lose time to the car behind).

searchIndex.title: Corner Name Readout
searchIndex.description: Phrases: read corner names, corner names, tell me the corner names (reads each corner name when you hit the mid-point, for this lap only – useful for testing).

searchIndex.title: Damage and Full Status Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: damage report, how's my car, is my car ok? (reports damage). car status (damage + temps + fuel). session status / race status (position + gaps + time left). full update / full status / update me (combines all three).

searchIndex.title: Fuel to Finish Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: how much fuel to the end, how much fuel do we need (reports litres/gallons needed to finish the race).

searchIndex.title: Car Class Information Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: is the car ahead in my class, is the car behind my class, what class is the car ahead, what class is the car behind (reports class name or 'faster'/'slower' if unavailable).

searchIndex.title: Pitstop Timing / Strategy Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: time this stop, practice pitstop, pitstop benchmark (times the next pitstop to calculate overall cost – practice only). where will i be after a stop?, estimate pit exit positions, what will happen if i pit? (estimates traffic and positions on exit).

searchIndex.title: Message Timing (Corners/Braking) Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: don't talk in the corners, don't talk in the braking zones, no messages in the corners (delays non-critical messages in challenging sections). talk to me anywhere, messages at any point (disables delay).

searchIndex.title: Alarm Clock Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: set alarm to [hour] [minutes], set alarm to [hour] [minutes] am/pm, alarm me at [hour] [minutes] (supports 12/24-hour and multiple alarms). clear alarm clock, clear alarms.

searchIndex.title: Cut Track Warning Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: enable cut track warnings, play cut track warnings. no cut track warnings, no more cut warnings (stops them).

searchIndex.title: Monitored Drivers Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: monitor [driver], team mate [driver], rival [driver] (adds to watch list). cancel monitored drivers, stop monitoring drivers, stop monitoring all (clears list). stop monitoring [driver] (removes specific).

searchIndex.title: iRacing Pitstop Configuration Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: pitstop add [X] liters, pitstop tearoff, pitstop fast repair, pitstop clear all, pitstop clear tyres, box, don't change tyres, pitstop change left front tyre, pitstop change all tyres, pitstop fuel to the end, etc.

searchIndex.title: RaceRoom Pitstop Configuration Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: pitstop change all tyres, pitstop change front tyres only, pitstop next tyre compound, pitstop hard tyres / medium tyres / soft tyres / prime tyres / option tyres, pitstop fix front aero only, pitstop fix suspension, pitstop serve penalty, pitstop refuel, etc.

searchIndex.title: Pitstop Plan Review Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what are the pit actions, what's the pitstop plan (reports all selected actions for the next pitstop).

searchIndex.title: iRacing SOF and Incident Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what's the sof, what is the strength of field. how many incidents do i have, what's my incident count, what's the incident limit.

searchIndex.title: Driver Ranking/Reputation Commands (if available)
searchIndex.description: Phrases: what's [driver]'s ranking, what's [driver]'s reputation, what's [driver]'s rating (also works with race positions, car ahead/behind).

searchIndex.title: rFactor 2 Multi-Function Display Commands
searchIndex.description: Phrases: select multi-function display screen display sectors, sector times pit menu tyres temps, temperatures race info standings penalties (rFactor 2 specific MFD selection).
